title: ACWA Power Signs Strategic Green Hydrogen Partnerships at Innovation Days 2026
content: ACWA Power concluded "Innovation Days 2026" in Riyadh by signing 27 strategic partnerships, significantly advancing its green hydrogen portfolio. Key agreements focused on the massive Yanbu Green Hydrogen Project, with Topsoe providing ammonia licensing, Baker Hughes collaborating on compression at the Innovation Hub, and EnBW and ITOCHU joining as co-developers and investors. The project targets 2.5 million tonnes of green ammonia annually. ACWA also partnered with technology innovators like Advanced Ionics, Shanghai H-Ray, and SunGreenH2 to pilot next-generation electrolyzers (PEM, AEM, and SOEC) aimed at reducing costs and improving efficiency. Further collaborations with AVL and ATOM-X explore sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and direct fuel conversion pathways. The event also established global R&D frameworks with partners like Chinaâ€™s NICE and Moroccoâ€™s IRESEN to accelerate the cleaner fuel ecosystem.
author: Analysts Account
